judge_reason: One description quotes a specific red stamp text ('REC'D F.B.I.' and 'DEC 5 1958') that the other description does not mention at all, indicating a clear hallucination of verbatim text.
original_image_tags: Circular green seal logo with text "TECHE PUBLISHING COMPANY" and oil derrick graphic.
gpt_mini_desc: *Image: Scanned typewritten letter on The Daily Iberian letterhead dated December 3, 1958, with multiple red and black handwritten annotations, stamps, and file markings; no separate photograph or illustration.*
